title: Saying Sorry
lesson: When you hurt someone, saying sorry helps make things better.
prompts: Place the person from the input image into a cosy, sunny living room with a soft rug, playing happily with colourful wooden blocks. The person from the input image stands on the far left, facing the camera at eye level with their face fully visible and a cheerful smile. On the right, {GENDER_M_AGE_06_RACE_WHITE} kneels beside a tall, neatly stacked block tower, looking proud. Eye-level medium-wide shot, warm afternoon sunlight, soft, bright storybook illustration style. Preserve the facial features, skin tone and hairstyle of the person from the input image.

A storybook scene in the same sunny living room. The person from the input image is on the far left, mid-step and reaching across, head turned toward the camera so the face stays clearly visible, with a surprised expression as their arm bumps the tall block tower. On the right, {GENDER_M_AGE_06_RACE_WHITE} sits on the rug watching as the wooden blocks tumble and scatter across the floor. Eye-level medium-wide shot, warm light, soft, bright storybook illustration style. Preserve the facial features, skin tone and hairstyle of the person from the input image.

The same living room with wooden blocks scattered across the soft rug. The person from the input image stands on the far left, facing the camera with their face fully visible and a worried, uncertain expression. On the right, {GENDER_M_AGE_06_RACE_WHITE} sits among the fallen blocks looking sad, with a downturned mouth. Eye-level medium shot, gentle warm light, soft, bright storybook illustration style. Preserve the facial features, skin tone and hairstyle of the person from the input image.

The person from the input image stands alone on the far left of the cosy living room, facing the camera with their face fully visible, one hand on their chest and a thoughtful, sorry expression as they hesitate. Scattered wooden blocks lie on the rug in the foreground. Eye-level medium shot, soft warm afternoon light, soft, bright storybook illustration style. Preserve the facial features, skin tone and hairstyle of the person from the input image.

The person from the input image is on the far left, kneeling on the rug but with the head turned toward the camera so the face stays clearly visible, gently helping to pick up the wooden blocks and rebuild the tower with a kind, apologetic smile. On the right, {GENDER_M_AGE_06_RACE_WHITE} kneels too, reaching for a block and beginning to smile again. Eye-level medium-wide shot, warm light, soft, bright storybook illustration style. Preserve the facial features, skin tone and hairstyle of the person from the input image.

The same sunny living room with the wooden block tower rebuilt tall behind them. The person from the input image is on the far left, facing the camera with their face fully visible and a happy, warm smile, sharing a friendly hug. On the right, {GENDER_M_AGE_06_RACE_WHITE} hugs back, beaming with joy. Eye-level medium shot, bright cheerful sunlight, soft, bright storybook illustration style. Preserve the facial features, skin tone and hairstyle of the person from the input image.
